settings.short_des:
Fabric : Cheniya Munga Silk

Technique : Cut Woak

Wearing : Weared With Zari and Two Colour Resham Thread Motif With Eligance Of Designs

Pcs : 3 Pcs Set

Choose

settings.custom_liquid: * Created by skilled artisans, each handmade, hand-embroidered, or handcrafted item is unique. Variations are expected and celebrated as part of the artisanal process not considered defects.

settings.content_return: Return within 30 days of purchase. Duties & taxes are non-refundable.

settings.title: Description
settings.content:
Get into timeless love with our pure Chanderi suit, featuring a beautifully embellished neckline, intricate thread work, and a sparkle of cutdana throughout the piece, adding a touch of grandeur. This exquisite ensemble is a true celebration of craftsmanship, tradition, and delicate two thread artistry.

Features

  • Color - Purple
  • Material - Banarasi
  • Made in india

settings.title: Product Details
settings.content: Get into timeless love with our pure Chanderi suit, featuring a beautifully embellished neckline, intricate thread work, and a sparkle of cutdana throughout the piece, adding a touch of grandeur. This exquisite ensemble is a true celebration of craftsmanship, tradition, and delicate two thread artistry.

settings.title: Product Care
settings.content:
• Store carefully, away from the sun, dust, and moisture, preferably in muslin cloth.

• Regularly air and refold the garment.

• Dry-clean the garment only when required.

• Avoid ironing directly on the zari and any direct contact with perfume.

settings.title: Shipping Information
settings.content:
The dress of your dreams! That will fit you like a dream! With a box-pleated flare that starts at the waist, it’s the perfect fit and flare dress that's ready for twirls of fun ;) Crafted from handloom cotton and hand-block printed with bold blooms, it’ll feel like slipping into comfort. 

We believe customers have a right to know how their product was made. 4.5 metres of handloom cotton fabric sourced from Jaipur has been used for this piece. Hand block printed by our artisans in Jaipur, manufactured in our workshop at Pune India.

settings.sub_heading: Every creation at Kalatantu is a testament to India’s rich artistic heritage, crafted with precision and passion by skilled artisans. Using age-old techniques passed down through generations, our products embody the beauty of tradition while embracing contemporary design. Each piece is thoughtfully made, ensuring authenticity, quality, and a deep connection to the roots of Indian craftsmanship.

By choosing our handcrafted products, you’re not just making a purchase—you’re becoming a part of a movement that values heritage and artistry. Your support empowers artisans, preserves traditional skills, and brings timeless elegance into your life. Experience the magic of craftsmanship, where every thread weaves a story of dedication, culture, and creativity.
